ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This is not usually necessary. If you have "Debug startup time" enabled in the Community Plugins tab you'll see startup times when using commmands
ast.target: 通常不需要这样做。如果你在社区插件选项卡中启用了“Debug startup time”，使用命令时将看到启动时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this is off, DAC will only match plugins by their ID
ast.target: 如果关闭此项，DAC 将只按插件 ID 进行匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Exclude plugins using regex (case insensitive).
Each new line is a new regex. Plugin ids are used for matching by default. Included plugins are on the left, excluded on the right.
ast.target:
使用正则表达式排除插件（不区分大小写）。
每一行都是一个新的正则。默认使用插件 ID 进行匹配。包含的插件在左侧，排除的在右侧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Exclude snippets using regex (case insensitive).
Each new line is a new regex. Snippet are only exclude by their name.
ast.target:
使用正则表达式排除片段（不区分大小写）。
每一行都是一个新的正则。片段仅按名称排除。

ast.name: heading
ast.target: CSS 代码片段

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Reset - forget the original state and set the current state as the new original state
ast.target: 插件重置 - 忘记原始状态并将当前状态设为新的原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Restore - return to the original state
ast.target: 插件恢复 - 返回原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Un-Bisect - Undo the last bisection, or enable all plugins if in the original state
ast.target: 插件取消二分 - 撤销上次二分，或在原始状态下启用所有插件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Bisect - Disable half of the active plugins, or return to the original state if all plugins are active
ast.target: 插件二分 - 禁用一半已启用的插件，或在所有插件均已启用时返回原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Plugin Re-Bisect - Undo the last bisection, then disable the other half
ast.target: 插件重新二分 - 撤销上次二分，然后禁用另一半

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Reset - forget the original state and set the current state as the new original state
ast.target: 代码片段重置 - 忘记原始状态并将当前状态设为新的原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Restore - return to the original state
ast.target: 代码片段恢复 - 返回原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Un-Bisect - Undo the last bisection, or enable all snippets if in the original state
ast.target: 代码片段取消二分 - 撤销上次二分，或在原始状态下启用所有代码片段

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Bisect - Disable half of the active snippets, or return to the original state if all snippets are active
ast.target: 代码片段二分 - 禁用一半已启用的代码片段，或在所有代码片段均已启用时返回原始状态

ast.name: name
ast.source: Snippet Re-Bisect - Undo the last bisection, then disable the other half
ast.target: 代码片段重新二分 - 撤销上次二分，然后禁用另一半

ast.name: text
ast.target: 分治

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changing any of the following settings will restore plugins to the original state.
ast.target: 更改以下任一设置将使插件恢复到原始状态。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.target: 重置 - 快照当前状态

ast.name: tooltip
ast.target: 还原 - 恢复快照

ast.name: tooltip
ast.target: 取消二分 - 上一级

ast.name: tooltip
ast.target: 二分 - 下一级

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Re-bisect - Go back a level, then down the other side
ast.target: 重新二分 - 先回到上一级，再向另一侧下探
